data.body: Investigated (debug-everything 2026-04-28): Blocking sub-bugs (275d-dfd5, 0cd6-57d6, 6286-cb8e) are all closed. Outbound sync and inbound TZ fix verified. Remaining: inbound EDIT verification and checkpoint rewind require live Jira bridge access and manual verification steps. Deferring — requires user action on Jira side.
